The '''''Blue Diver''''' was a [[Mon Calamari heavy carrier]] operated by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] out of the [[Second Fleet]] in the years following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it was recalled from its annual mission to the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]], where it was searching for remaining pockets of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] resistance, in order to take part in [[Operation Roundabout]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. [[Gray Squadron (Aleph-class)|Gray Squadron]] was stationed onboard ''Blue Diver'', as was [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Baradis (Galactic Alliance)|Baradis]]. Following the [[Battle of Corellia (Second Galactic Civil War)|breaking]] of the Alliance blockade by combined [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]], Commenorian, and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] forces, the ''Blue Diver'' withdrew from Corellian space to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Following heavy damage sustained by the [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carrier]] [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']], the ''Blue Diver'' became the new [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] for [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Second Fleet]] commanding officer [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarla Limpan]].

The ''Blue Diver'', with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarla Limpan]] commanding and [[Syal Antilles]] assigned to one of her [[Aleph-class starfighter]] squadrons led a task force of Alliance reinforcements in a ambush set by Corellian forces. With Alliance forces fully committed to the battle, Corellians fired [[Centerpoint Station]] with the intention of destroying the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] and thereby killing [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. The blast failed in this but succeeding in destroying both Corellian and Alliance fleets, including the ''Blue Diver'' with all hands. The only known survivors were [[Syal Antilles]] and [[Zueb Zan]], along with their [[Unidentified R2 unit (Gray Squadron)|astromech]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''
